# Iron Horse Diesel Service

## Business Summary
Iron Horse Diesel Service is a diesel-only repair and heavy equipment service shop located in Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario, Canada. The business has operated since 1995 and specialises exclusively in diesel-powered vehicles and equipment.

## Services
- Diesel engine repair and rebuild (in-shop)
- Fleet maintenance programmes (commercial and industrial accounts)
- Heavy equipment service (off-road machinery, construction, forestry)
- Fuel system diagnostics and fuel injection repair
- 24/7 mobile breakdown service (field dispatch)

## Service Area
Primary: Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario
Extended: Algoma District, Blind River, Elliot Lake, Wawa, Northern Ontario corridor

## Contact
Phone: (705) 555-0318
Email: service@ironhorsediesel.ca
Website: https://ironhorsediesel.ca
Location: Sault Ste. Marie, Ontario, Canada

## Hours of Operation
Monday to Friday: 7:00 am – 6:00 pm
Saturday: 8:00 am – 2:00 pm
Sunday: Closed
Emergency breakdown: 24/7

## Owner
Gary Fillion

## Structure
- Home page: overview, services, process, testimonials
- Services page: full description of all service offerings
- About page: business history, team, certifications
- Contact page: form, map, phone, hours

## Technology
Website built with Next.js (App Router), hosted in Canada.

## Legal
Privacy policy: https://ironhorsediesel.ca/privacy (PIPEDA compliant)
Terms of service: https://ironhorsediesel.ca/terms
